title: No injuries reported in Alhof Drive collision
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The Da Gamaskop Police are investigating a case of reckless and negligent driving following a two-vehicle accident in Alhof Drive, D'Almeida, this afternoon, 7 February.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Da Gamaskop Police are investigating a case of reckless and negligent driving following a two-vehicle accident in Alhof Drive, D'Almeida, this afternoon, 7 February."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"One vehicle flipped onto its roof and the other caught on fire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams responded to the scene, as well as the police.","html":"The Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams responded to the scene, as well as the police."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Southern Cape Police's spokesperson, Warrant Officer Chris Spies, told Mossel Bay Advertiser one of the drivers had fled the scene.","html":"The Southern Cape Police's spokesperson, Warrant Officer Chris Spies, told Mossel Bay Advertiser one of the drivers had fled the scene."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"No injuries were reported."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One vehicle had flipped on its roof. Photo: Gerard Jansen","html":"One vehicle had flipped on its roof. Photo: Gerard Jansen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
